column2: taxon name from the original source file
scientific or common name (we can accommodate either; common names will be translated to scientific names during the 'taxa translate' step)

TaxaID_orig translated to an ID that harmonizes differences across data sources (such as syntax, changes in nomenclature, misspellings, etc.). DNI = not included. Used for the Lower Boise River Fish BCG (version 1) metric calculations
TRUE = TaxaID_orig is different from the LBR_BCG_v1; FALSE = TaxaID_orig is the same as the LBR_BCG_v1
reason for LBR_BCG_v1 change (e.g., formatting, spelling)
includes all fish taxa (harmonized across data sources), even ones at coarser levels of taxonomic resolution that aren't included in the BCG calculation (which are marked as DNI in LBR_BCG_v1)
